page.title: Template:Lists of National Treasures of Japan

revision.comment: categorization (see also [[WP:CAT#]]) (via [[WP:JWB]])
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:Lists of National Treasures of Japan]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] [[en:Lists of National Treasures of Japan]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Lists of National Treasures of Japan]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] [[en:Lists of National Treasures of Japan]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]] [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] [[en:Lists of National Treasures of Japan]][[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: fixing my error
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''

}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''

}}<noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
</noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[:en:National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''

}}<noinclude>

</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[:en:National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
| belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = * {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:National Treasures of Japan|Category]]
}}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Cultural Property (Japan) navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
</noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[:en:National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]

| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''

}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Lists of National Treasures of Japan | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[:en:National Treasure (Japan)|National Treasures of Japan]]
| group1 = Buildings and structures | list1 = * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (castles)|Castles]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (residences)|Residences]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|Shrines]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (temples)|Temples]] * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Structures related to industry, transportation and public works|structures related to industry, transportation and public works]]'' * ''[[National Treasure (Japan)#Miscellaneous structures|other structures]]''
| group2 = Fine arts and crafts | list2 = * [[National Treasure (Japan)#Historical materials|Historical materials]] * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (paintings)|Paintings]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (sculptures)|Sculptures]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Japanese books)|Japanese books]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: Chinese books)|Chinese books]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (writings: others)|other written material]]'' * [[:en:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (ancient documents)|Ancient documents]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|Archaeological materials]] * [[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: swords)|Swords]] * ''[[:en:List of National Treasures of Japan (crafts: others)|other crafts]]''
